use_cases: Scheduling appointments in healthcare or service applications
Booking reservations in hospitality or restaurant platforms
Setting reminders or events in productivity tools
Collecting date of birth or temporal data in forms
Planning travel itineraries in booking applications
ai_summary: A React Aria-based calendar component with time picker functionality for selecting dates and times. Features accessible keyboard navigation, minimal flat styling with hover and focus states, and integrates seamlessly into shadcn/ui design systems. Ideal for any application requiring date/time input with proper accessibility support.
